style_effects: Constant static sparks crackle in electric blue and white, drifting erratically around Charizard's body like floating lightning bolts; a pulsing electromagnetic aura radiates in sharp cyan waves, distorting the air with visible energy ripples; cold blue-white light pulses from its eyes and tail, casting stark, geometric shadows in the surrounding space. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
